Current-head passing tests enforce executable structured target-bound failure-mode evidence and reject keyword-only evidence.
Unit, integration, CLI, E2E, typecheck, and docs build evidence is current-head bound and covers the changed path surface.
Typed atomic declarations, legacy split compatibility, contract-bound evidence, and public CLI replay are covered by current-head tests.
Pre-merge rollback rehearsal passes, while canonical-main post-merge canary and release-owner operational observation remain a post-merge boundary.
Typed atomic scope is enforced at schema and validation boundaries with invalid input rejection, without conflating review governance with auth denial.
Focused pre-merge rollback rehearsal passes; an actual revert of the not-yet-existing merge commit is correctly deferred to post-merge release ownership.
Lifecycle identity, replacement, and artifact replay are tested, but current-head required review lifecycles still need closure.
Lane graph and changed-path coverage are sound, but strict current-head review owner mapping still needs closure.
Story purpose, user story, and fifteen acceptance criteria trace through Architecture, Spec, and changed implementation surfaces.
Current-head CLI, E2E, and focused integration exercise owner lifecycle, path binding, and legacy fallback on the executable path.
Fifteen Spec contracts and Architecture boundaries align with current-head unit, E2E, typecheck, and build evidence.
Scope, review ownership, verification, rollback, and release boundaries are explicit, with focused rollback rehearsal passing 4/4.
Unit and E2E evidence cover timed-out lifecycle and replacement recovery.
Tests reject malformed observed input, malformed JSON, and malformed TAP without inference, including explicit parse_failure coverage.
Unit and E2E cover stale evidence, current-head binding, replacement lifecycle, and replay artifacts.
E2E and validation sequencing cover stale, pending, over-green state and Gate DAG recomputation.

現HEADのE2Eでflow_replay、artifact_replay、scenario_clause_e2eを含む実行状態を確認できる。

現行verification evidenceとTAP/E2Eでtimeout、parse、schema、evidence lifecycle、workflow stateを実行検証している。

公開CLI経路、legacy compatibility、出力契約を現行E2EとCIで確認した。
事前rollback rehearsalと手順は検証済みだが、canonical mainでのpost-merge canaryと実revert証跡は未取得。
lifecycle identity、HEAD binding、timeout/recovery、artifact replayは検証済みだが、gate reviewのcurrent-head再記録が必要。
41変更ファイルのlane/path-surfaceとatomic owner条件は確認できるが、current-head owner mapとgate evidenceの閉鎖が必要。
release、observability、support、rollbackの責任境界と事前rehearsalはあるが、post-merge運用証跡は未取得。
required review timeout、manual shutdown、replacement lifecycleをfail-closedに確認。
現HEADのunit/E2Eでunsupported phaseやmalformed inputのreject動作を確認。
malformed reviewer outputとtyped atomic schema不正入力がpassへ昇格しない。
stale HEAD、open/running lifecycle、identity不一致をfail-closedで扱う。
validation sequenceがHEAD driftとfrozen binding不一致を拒否する。

sequence全phaseとruntime reviewがcurrent HEADでpassed。
typed scope、依存境界、owner binding、legacy互換を実証した。
unsafe scope、review lifecycle、rollback、legacy境界を明示しfail-closed。
timeout、parse、schema、lifecycle、workflowの負経路を実証した。

timeout後のclose、replacement start、recordをfail-closedで確認。
unsupported/malformed inputが明示エラーでrejectされる。
incomplete、prose-only、disconnected typed payloadはacceptへ昇格しない。
open、stale、identity mismatch lifecycleを拒否しreplacement chainを保持する。
